seed_expert_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Combine Gemini 3.1 Pro, Opus 4.7, and GPT 5.5 into complex multi-agent systems where each agent specializes (coding, testing, research) and a master agent orchestrates; enables one-prompt complex app/automation building and custom SaaS replacement.
OpenAI Codex one-shots full Raspberry Pi setup including home WiFi accessibility, demonstrating practical agentic hardware configuration and ongoing 'chief of staff' agent deployment.

global_discoveries.project: Agent memory persistence via read/write stores and dreaming loop
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Anthropic engineer outlines 4 steps for cross-session agent memory using read/write stores plus a 'dreaming loop' for self-updates, achieving 95% cache hit rate at zero extra cost.

Shift from human-paced file I/O and step-by-step workflows to fully autonomous agent runtimes using instant in-memory virtual filesystems, parallel tool calls, and RAM/databases for higher GPU utilization and instant reactions without human bottlenecks.

global_discoveries.project: Private MCP Server for agent privacy
global_discoveries.technical_takeaway: Veilnet Private MCP Server enables AI agents to run crypto/DeFi workflows with encrypted strategy context (amounts, timing, logic) kept local/user-controlled; model sees only tool calls while sensitive data stays encrypted, compatible with Claude Code, Codex, etc.

near_misses.technical_takeaway: Flash 3.5 praised as quick, smart, and enjoyable for daily interaction.
near_misses.reason: Model praise but lacks specific technical innovation or actionable details beyond general usability.

notes: Searches limited to past 24 hours (since 2026-05-24). Seed experts yielded limited high-signal technical posts; global search surfaced strong memory and agent architecture themes. Selected only clearest actionable innovations; max 6 per array enforced.
